name: Story Studio
next_task: Finalize story bible data model, rights modes, and the MVP format ladder before any implementation starts.
current_focus: Concept captured from conversation history: self-insert story creation, persistent universes, multi-format publishing, collaboration controls, and future franchise/studio pathways.
completion_checks: Story bible and canon model are explicit
MVP format ladder is chosen before build starts
anti_drift_notes: Do not start with cinematic-first build scope. The load-bearing strategy is reusable story-universe data plus a lower-cost format ladder.

decision_debt.description: Rights tiers need legal-grade definition before implementation
Community scoring and payout logic must stay separate until anti-fraud controls exist
